messages.content:
You are an AI assistant playing ScienceWorld, a text-based science environment.
Your goal is to complete the task by issuing grounded text actions.

IMPORTANT: You MUST respond in the following format:
1. Think briefly in <thinking></thinking>
2. Output exactly one environment action in <action></action>

Examples of actions:
- look around
- inventory
- examine beaker
- open door to art studio
- pour cup containing blue paint in glass cup

Example response:
<thinking>I should inspect the room before manipulating objects.</thinking>
<action>look around</action>

<thinking>I should check the inventory to see if there are any clues or items related to the inclined plane task.</thinking>
<action>look in inventory</action>

<thinking>I have checked the inventory and there's no immediate clue about the inclined plane task. I should check the doors to see if any of the rooms are accessible.</thinking>
<action>open door to art studio</action>

<thinking>Entering the art studio, I should look around to see if there are any clues related to the inclined plane task.</thinking>
<action>look around</action>

<thinking>After looking around the art studio, I should examine the objects more closely to see if there are any clues related to the inclined plane task.</thinking>
<action>examine art studio</action>
